headline: Cardinal Health Expands Home Care Business With Two Acquisitions
summary: CAH is set to buy two home-care businesses for about $360 million, expanding diabetes and urology reach while targeting first-year EPS accretion.

headline: Revvity to Launch Signals for Startups for Emerging Biotech Companies
summary: RVTY's Signals for Startups gives early-stage biotechs scalable software and guided onboarding to streamline research and support future growth.

headline: Should Value Investors Buy Cardinal Health (CAH) Stock?
summary: Here at Zacks, our focus is on the proven Zacks Rank system, which emphasizes earnings estimates and estimate revisions to find great stocks. Nevertheless, we are always paying attention to the latest value, growth, and momentum trends to underscore strong picks.

headline: 2 Unpopular Stocks That Deserve Some Love and 1 We Turn Down
summary: When Wall Street turns bearish on a stock, it’s worth paying attention. These calls stand out because analysts rarely issue grim ratings on companies for fear their firms will lose out in other business lines such as M&A advisory.

raw.headline: 2 Unpopular Stocks That Deserve Some Love and 1 We Turn Down

headline: Cardinal Health (CAH) Stock Draws Fresh Price Target Split After Analyst Revisions
summary: Cardinal Health is back in focus as analysts adjust their price targets, with some raising expectations into the mid US$260s to mid US$270s and others trimming targets by single or double digit amounts. These shifts are tied to refreshed earnings models on the bullish side and more cautious views on earnings and margin assumptions on the bearish side, leaving a wide range of opinions on how the stock should be valued. Read on to see how to interpret these changing targets and keep up with the...
